sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports nasal congestion and reports feeling a burning sensation in their chest. The patient states the chest pain is not severe. The patient reports shortness of breath.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 128/78. Heart rate is 82 bpm and regular. Temperature is 98.6°F. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has known coronary artery disease and is experiencing symptoms consistent with angina. Differential includes musculoskeletal chest pain and anxiety.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a physical exam. A lipid panel will be ordered. The patient will start crestor 20 mg once a day. The patient will continue on aspirin. The patient will continue on toprol.
